title: Textellent MCP Orchestration DSL
description: Breaking v2.0: typed pipeline of pure relational operators (A1–A52) followed by audited effectful tool steps. Use plan.version "2.0" and plan.pipeline only.

whenToUse: Bulk transforms with explicit project/filter/join/validate partitions.
Effectful API calls with audit trail and optional confirmation barrier.
howToUse: Provide plan.pipeline with permissions, limits, initialState.datasets, and stages.
Pure stages list ops (project, filter, join, validate, …). Effect stages set pure:false and effect.tool.
Use dryRun:true to validate only. Use preview:true to run pure steps and type-check effect payloads without calling tools.
Pass confirmationToken when a confirmable effect requires it (A47).
